description_long: This object is a round, shallow plate with a matching bowl placed at its center, both crafted from a material resembling wood with a matte, slightly rough finish. The plate is accompanied by a wooden fork, spoon, and a goblet, all sharing the same color and texture, suggesting a coordinated set. The plate itself has a broad, flat rim and a gently sloping interior, suitable for holding food or small items. The wood grain is subtly visible across all surfaces, giving the set a rustic, handcrafted appearance. There are no visible markings, inscriptions, or decorative patterns on the plate or its accompanying items. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A round, wooden plate with a matching bowl, fork, spoon, and goblet, all featuring a rustic, matte finish and subtle wood grain.
description_view_0: The plate and bowl are seen from the front, with the fork, spoon, and goblet clearly visible and arranged in a typical place setting.
description_view_1: The plate and bowl are viewed from an angle, with the spoon in the foreground and the goblet set further back, highlighting the set's depth.
description_view_2: The plate and bowl are centered, with the spoon and goblet on either side, showing the symmetry of the set.
description_view_3: The plate and bowl are seen from the opposite side, with the fork in the foreground and the goblet partially out of view.
